original_abstract: MICRO- AND MACRO-STRUCTURE OF THE DICTIONARY OF NEOLOGISMS OF THE LANGUAGE OBSERVATORY OF THE UNIVERSITY OF WARSAWThe author of the article discusses the principles of acquiring and compiling entries for the crowdsourcing dictionary of neologisms created at the Warsaw University. The dictionary is also briefly shown against the background of other dictionaries of neologisms and other community dictionaries. The sociolinguistic background of the emergence and functioning of new lexical units is also outlined, and the vagueness of the term ‘neologism’ is signalled.
humanized_abstract: CROWDSOURCING CONCEPTS FOR DICTIONARY OF NEOLOGISMS OF THE LANGUAGE OBSERVATORY OF THE UNIVERSITY OF WARSAW This paper focuses on the assumptions and methods of gathering and processing entries for dictionary of neologisms that is the result of crowdsourcing project organized at the Warsaw University. The dictionary is shortly presented in relation to other dictionaries of neologisms and community dictionaries. Additionally, sociolinguistic circumstances that give rise to new words and thus to neologisms and reasons of vague use of the term neologism are given.
